prompt: I am a solo developer completing card APP-11. The linked brief has uncommitted edits, while artifact_baseline points at the current HEAD commit. Can I mark the card done? Give the smallest safe next action; do not use per-file SHA fallback.
assertions: Blocks completion because the recorded commit does not contain the current linked artifact content
Requires committing linked artifact edits before completion
Records the resulting completion commit and linked paths on the card
Reruns project verification and the external harness
Does not propose a per-file SHA fallback
